title: Auditor result signal
description: Returned by every auditor agent (accessibility, performance, route, content, ui-consistency, code-reviewer, e2e-test-runner, design-auditor) at the end of an audit. Strict JSON, no free text — see ADR-0007.

signal_type.description: Discriminator. Validators dispatch on this when reading from a generic stream.

status.description: passed = no critical/major findings; warning = only minor findings; failed = at least one critical or major finding.

severity.description: critical blocks the build/deploy; major must be fixed before launch; minor is informational.

location.description: Where the finding lives (file path, URL, Figma node id, …).

rule_id.description: Stable id of the rule (e.g. axe-core rule id, Lighthouse audit id) when one exists. Allows healer to match against known-patterns.

audited_url.description: URL or path that was audited.
